prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: STRUCTURE OF THE G62T MUTANT OF SHIGA-LIKE TOXIN I B SUBUNIT. Entity description: SHIGA TOXIN B-CHAIN. Organism: Phage h30. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. V71 shard: V71C_BETA_BARREL_PROPELLER_REPEAT_SOLENOID_ENRICHED. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: v71_candidate_missing_word:closed_beta_topology. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V71 E66 metadata context marks: assembly_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E66 words are allowed; candidate E67 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
V71 withholds candidate new word closed_beta_topology before seal

v71_context_policy.context_derivation: V71 E66 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E66-known words are allowed; candidate E67 words are withheld from prediction context so V71 can discover them.
